## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss technical SEO audit findings, content updates, and future product features.](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Technical SEO audit revealed minor issues, mostly resolved (HTTP/canonical tag fixes)](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Content performance metrics trending positively; expanding insurance cluster content](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [New marketing conversion flow in development, featuring embeddable role-play widgets](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Future product direction: AI-powered sales call analysis and scoring system](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

## Topics

### Technical SEO Audit Results

  - [No critical errors found; main issues stemmed from one URL affecting multiple errors](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [HTTP issue resolved: 32 instances of naked "exec.com" URLs identified for correction](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Canonical tag error fixed on enterprise-privacy page (previously linked to non-existent enterprise-ai)](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Minor warnings (e.g., text-to-HTML ratio) deemed low priority, except for sales comp page](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)

### Content Performance & Updates

  - [Overall positive trends in clicks and impressions for GrowthX articles](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Added bullet points and FAQ sections to existing content](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Plans to expand the insurance content cluster in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### New Marketing Features

  - [Developing a conversion flow starting with bot-driven role-play creation](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Creating an embeddable widget for articles to initiate role-plays](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Aim: Generate leads and nurture potential enterprise accounts through product engagement](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Future Product Direction: AI-Powered Call Analysis

  - [Concept: Analyze recorded sales calls to provide performance analytics and insights](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Features may include:](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [Grading calls on adherence to sales processes](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Measuring concrete next steps set during calls](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
      - [Assessing rep performance on empathy, discovery questions, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Potential integrations with existing call recording tools (Gong, Fathom, Fireflies, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Goal: Provide continuous monitoring and improvement recommendations for sales teams](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to provide content for the sales comp page to improve text-to-HTML ratio](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Sean to implement Google Analytics event tracking for the sales objection handling GPT](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of recent content updates and GPT implementations](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Explore content creation around call analysis and scoring concepts for future product](https://fathom.video/share/o3oZsRe5rUur3v1H8bJhPp151xY5ze3s?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
